subject: WM-0152 unblocked after WM-0160
body: WM-0152 is unblocked. WM-0160 is verified, done, merged and pushed to origin/main at 45f0e5f; this worktree has been fast-forwarded to main while preserving your existing product UI WIP. Replace the debug/hot-poll advance loop with apps/web/src/simulation-worker-session.ts public helpers: waitForWebPlayableProjectionAtOrBeyondTick and especially drainWebPlayableCommandsToTerminal. Continue WM-0152 only in its allowed product UI paths. Do not import sim-core, sim-worker subpaths, packages/*/src internals, parse wm0150.advance ids, parse summaries/debug payloads as gameplay state, or synthesize Web authority. Required product result remains a player-facing playable chain: default player HUD, selectable objects/actors, visible authoritative pawn/job movement/progress, lamp priority command, build placement/queue command, terminal job feedback and structured failure reasons. Update tests and WM-0152 report; run required gates; taskctl complete to reviewer when ready.
